name: SentinelOne
description: Monitor SentinelOne endpoint agents and threat status for device security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your SentinelOne management console as an Admin.
2. Navigate to Settings > Users, click your user name.
3. In the API Token section, click Generate API Token.
4. Copy the token.
5. Enter your console URL (e.g. https://usea1.sentinelone.net) and the API token in CompAI.

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies SentinelOne agents are healthy and not infected

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists all endpoints managed by SentinelOne for device inventory

checks.name: Threat Detection
checks.description: Checks for unresolved threats in SentinelOne and flags critical or malicious incidents

checks.name: Policy Enforcement
checks.description: Verifies that endpoint protection policies are configured across SentinelOne groups

checks.name: Agent Version Currency
checks.description: Checks for outdated SentinelOne agent versions across the fleet and compares against available GA releases
